title: When will Item Description be out of Beta?
excerpt: I see that there is a Item Description function that is in beta. The beta version does not seem to be available because it does not appear in the monday.labs list. When will this feature be out of beta and available to e…

posts.author: garv1sh (Luke Garvey)
posts.cookedHtml: I see that there is a Item Description function that is in beta. The beta version does not seem to be available because it does not appear in the monday.labs list. When will this feature be out of beta and available to everyone? My team is testing out Monday, but if this feature is not available, Monday will not work for us.
